note: Machine-readable crosswalk. Executable conditions are measured locally under one frozen model; citation-only methods are external literature we compare against conceptually and DO NOT reproduce.

executable_conditions.purpose: Frozen-LLM control with no persistent memory; isolates what the model answers from parametric knowledge alone
Upper-bound context control: entire concatenated multi-session history in-context uncompressed
executable_conditions.closest_literature_category: full-context prompting (cf. long-context / Mem0 full-context eval)

executable_conditions.purpose: RAG-style exact retrieval over full-text chunks with a float32 index; the fidelity anchor for compression comparisons
Recency/FIFO forgetting: evict oldest items regardless of utility; ablates HAM's utility-driven retention
executable_conditions.closest_literature_category: fixed-window / FIFO forgetting (cf. Mamba selective forget

executable_conditions.purpose: Static pre-computed prototypes with no adaptive promotion/consolidation over time
executable_conditions.closest_literature_category: static memory index (cf. A-MEM without evolution

executable_conditions.purpose: HAM store with uniform (non-utility) bit allocation; isolates the value of utility-driven precision
executable_conditions.closest_literature_category: uniform post-training quantization (cf. AQLM improves over uniform)

executable_conditions.purpose: HAM: working/episodic/semantic tiers + consolidation + utility-driven bit allocation + VQ + text codec
HAM with random tier assignment; control that removes the importance signal from tiering
HAM without episodic->semantic consolidation; ablates the consolidation stage
HAM without the recency importance signal
HAM without the novelty importance signal
HAM without the reuse importance signal
HAM with lexical-only (BM25-lite) retrieval instead of dense cosine

citation_only_methods.why_not_runnable: ASIC/FPGA memory controller; out of scope for an LLM-memory software harness
citation_only_methods.reproduction_label: cited only; NOT implemented or reproduced

citation_only_methods.why_not_runnable: requires trillion-token retrieval pretraining; cross-attention fusion appears only as an analogue in the architecture prototype
architecture-level stateful models needing training; only a shape/gradient stand-in exists in ham.architecture
additive-quantization codebook training over model weights; only the uniform-vs-utility contrast is exercised locally
KV-cache/activation compression benchmark; the PoC compresses an external store, not the KV cache
